title: Folia Orbitals
description: Adds Orbital Strikes To Minecraft, Ran Through A Plugin. Folia Supported.
body:
# Folia Orbitals
This plugin adds 3 different types of orbital strikes to minecraft. It functions fairly similar to how orbital cannons are seen on servers such as Unstable SMP.

Supports Folia!

## Ring Nuke:

Summons multiple rings of tnt that expands from the center. This is the most known type of orbital strike.

## Large Ring Nuke:

Functions the same as the Ring Nuke, but has a larger radius.

## Orbital Stab:

Summons a line of tnt that goes down to bedrock from where it is activated.


Use /orbital (type) to give yourself the fishing rods.
